title: bidens odora
intro: Bidens odora, also known as sweet goldenrod, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is native to eastern North America, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant's health benefits include alleviating symptoms of colds and fever, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting the immune system. Bidens odora is often used to prepare teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its dried flowers and leaves can be used in herbal remedies, such as cough syrups and fever reducers.
